message:
feat(tools): add duplicate detection in partner lighthouse programs and refine tooling modules

Enhance partner_lighthouse_programs with duplicate deployment and outcome
detection (PLP-ERR-003, PLP-ERR-004) including validation tests. Update
benchmark_suite, frontier_demo_gate, migration_validation_cohorts,
profile_tuning_harness, safe_extension_onboarding, security_trust_metrics,
vef_perf_budget_gate, and verifier_toolkit with minor consistency improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -379,11 +379,11 @@ impl ProfileTuningHarness {
                     class_id: candidate.class_id.clone(),
                     old_symbol_size: old_symbol,
                     new_symbol_size: candidate.symbol_size_bytes,
-                    old_overhead: old_overhead,
+                    old_overhead,
                     new_overhead: candidate.overhead_ratio,
-                    old_priority: old_priority,
+                    old_priority,
                     new_priority: candidate.fetch_priority.clone(),
-                    old_prefetch: old_prefetch,
+                    old_prefetch,
                     new_prefetch: candidate.prefetch_policy.clone(),
                     p99_encode_change_pct: p99_encode_change,
                     p99_decode_change_pct: p99_decode_change,
